admin.body_font_help: The font used for body text across your forum. Start typing to search the Google Fonts library, or upload your own font to self-host it.
admin.heading_font_help: The font used for headings and titles. Leave blank to keep the body font.
admin.preview_text: The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog 0123456789
admin.no_font: No font selected — using the theme default.
admin.switch_to_upload: Upload your own font (works where Google is blocked)
admin.upload_hint: Self-host the font from your forum so it loads everywhere — including regions where Google Fonts is blocked (e.g. mainland China). Upload one .woff2 file per weight you want; a variable .woff2 covers every weight in one file.
admin.name_your_font: Give your font a name to preview it.
admin.only_woff2: Only .woff2 files are supported. Convert your font to woff2 first.
